name: Hades
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Hades silent king — wealth of roots, crown of shadows.
flowText: Hades silent king — wealth of roots, crown of shadows.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Obsidian
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: XIII. Death
related.teaser: Death is not an end but a passage — dissolution of form into the dark womb of renewal.

related.name: Jet
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: Osiris
related.teaser: Osiris embodies underworld, wealth, endings — under Saturn · Pluto; in Scorpio, Capricorn.

related.name: Hel
related.teaser: Hel embodies underworld, wealth, endings — under Saturn · Pluto; in Scorpio, Capricorn.

related.name: ♏ Scorpio
related.teaser: Scorpio is the underworld’s gate — serpent of shadow, phoenix flame, keeper of mysteries.

related.name: ♄ Saturn
related.teaser: Saturn is the black mountain — the ring of time, stern father, weight of law.

related.name: Anubis
related.teaser: Anubis is a quiet axis — Jackal; under Mercury; in Scorpio; with XIII Death.

related.name: Fire Agate
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: Black Tourmaline
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.
